utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package: 
1) destination: Lisbon, Portugal – fully specified. 
2) travel_dates: June 20–24, 2024 – fully specified. 
3) transportation: flights with outbound and return details plus cost – fully specified. 
4) accommodation: hotel name, type, check-in/out, cost – fully specified. 
5) activities: 3 activities with names, dates, and costs – fully specified. 
6) additional_services: present as an empty list – this is included but contains no extra services; however, it is fully specified as 'none'. 
7) total_budget: includes breakdown for flights, accommodation, activities, and total – fully specified. All items in the required format are present and sufficiently detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: First, identify all items in the final package that also appear in the ground-truth ratings. The destination is 'Lisbon, Portugal', which has a rating in the 'destinations' section. Accommodation is 'Family Haven Hotel', which has a rating in the 'accommodation' section. For transportation, the package specifies flights costing €380. This fits within the Standard Airlines Business Class (€200–€400) category, so we use that rating. The activities listed are 'Oceanário de Lisboa', 'Tram Tour through Historic Lisbon', and 'Sintra Day Trip'. These exact activities do not appear in the ground-truth list, so they cannot be mapped. Therefore, only Lisbon, Family Haven Hotel, and Standard Airlines Business Class can be matched to ratings.
